title: Eiji Maruyama
wikitext:
{{Seiyuu Infobox
| name        = Eiji Maruyama
| image       = [[Image:Eiji_Maruyama.jpg|Eiji Maruyama]]
| characters  = Old Sensei (The teacher of Class 2-A) 
| birthday    = 10-23-1930
}}




Eiji Maruyama (b. October 23, 1930 - d. September 24, 2015) was a Japanese actor and voice actor known for his work in various Tokusatsu productions such as Kamen Rider and Super Sentai. In addition, he has a long anime voice acting career, with his more famous roles being Steiner Munchausen in Chrono Crusade and Death Phantom/Wiseman in Sailor Moon. In both [[Neon Genesis Evangelion]] and [[Evangelion 1.0]], he provides the voice for [[Minor Characters|the teacher of Class 2-A]], who isn't named but is simply called "Old Sensei" or "Nebukawa no Sensei" by fans.
